##RRUFFID=R170037

##LOCALITY=Silberberg mine, Bodenmais, Zwiesel, Bavarian Forest, Lower Bavaria, Bavaria, Germany
##OWNER=UAMM
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Massive dark to bluish-green
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
